label: Ceasefires Currently in Force
contestNote: Lebanon ceasefire fraying Apr 28: Israel continues operations beyond buffer zone; Hezbollah declared extension 'meaningless.' US-Iran: indefinite ceasefire technically holds but Iran's Apr 28 Hormuz proposal rejected framing as prerequisite to nuclear talks; Trump warned Iran 'get smart soon' Apr 29 (both Islamabad rounds failed, 20-yr vs 5-yr enrichment gap unchanged, frozen conflict risk cited). Gaza Phase II 'increasingly fragile' per UN ASG Khiari Apr 28: 800+ Palestinians killed since ceasefire, Hamas rejected disarmament clause. Sudan, DRC-Rwanda (Rwanda non-compliant), Yemen framework all contested
deltaNote: vs Jan 2026 — Lebanon fraying (Apr 28), Iran frozen conflict risk (Apr 29), Gaza UN-described 'increasingly fragile' (Apr 28); 10 frameworks nominally in force with 3+ under acute violation

label: Processes Collapsed Since 2020
contestNote: US-Iran: both Islamabad rounds collapsed; Iran's Apr 28 Hormuz proposal (deferring nuclear) rejected by US framing; Trump warned 'get smart soon' Apr 29 — frozen conflict risk rising. List: Afghanistan (Doha), Sudan Jeddah track, Myanmar (ASEAN 5-pt Consensus), Ethiopia-Tigray (partial impl.), Colombia ELN (since Jan 2025), Libya LPDF, Gaza Phase II (Hamas disarmament rejected, UN: 'increasingly fragile' Apr 28), Yemen (ongoing violations), DRC-Rwanda (Rwanda non-compliant)
deltaNote: US-Iran Round 2 cancelled Apr 26 + Myanmar 100-day offer rejected Apr 21; Iran Hormuz proposal Apr 28-29 attempts restart but nuclear gap unresolved — frozen conflict increasingly likely
